'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 100''' is the one hundredth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[November 26]], [[2003]].

{{Book-stub}}

==Contents==
*[[Diversity Alliance]]
*[[First Battle of Geonosis#Confrontation with Darth Tyranus|Lightsaber Duel with Count Dooku]]
